violations.text: Dine-in menu is missing full consumer advisory. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Establishment is using their take-out menus currently until dine-in menus are reprinted. Take-out menus observed with consumer advisory and allergen statement present. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026

Wood is used in the construction of rice cooker table and side table in the cookline area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026

Allergen advisory statement is lacking on dine-in menus. A written advisory to inform consumers of their responsibility to notify staff of any food allergies is required. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026

Raw animal foods such as raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as portioned to-go sauces in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and all knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment/utensils were cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Dine-in menu is missing full consumer advisory. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026

Food and single service ware were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer and basement. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Flexible ducts leading to kitchen hood from make-up air vent is attached with cardboard and duct tape. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026

Wood is used in the construction of rice cooker table and side table in the cookline area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026
Air gap is lacking on food prep sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
The kitchen hood vents have an accumulation of soil residue and grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026
Top of 3 bay sink basin juncture observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
Air gap is lacking on food prep sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The door to the toilet room in basement is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license is expired. PIC informed. FMC must re-instate, food safety certificate is active. Proof of registration to be provided to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025
Walk-In Freezer not operational during time of inspection. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
Top of 3 bay sink basin juncture observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
Air gap is lacking on food prep sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The door to the toilet room in basement is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
